obligations.informal_statement: The volume ratio V(unit_ball_d) / V([-1,1]^d) tends to zero as d tends to infinity.
obligations.lean_statement: theorem high_dim_ball_cube_ratio_tends_zero : Tendsto ballCubeRatio atTop (𝓝 0) := by

obligations.informal_statement: For fixed epsilon in (0,1), the cube boundary-shell probability tends to one.
obligations.lean_statement: theorem cube_boundary_shell_probability_tends_one (ε : Real) (hε : 0 < ε ∧ ε < 1) : Tendsto (fun d => 1 - (1 - ε)^d) atTop (𝓝 1) := by

obligations.informal_statement: For independent symmetric terminal leaves, raw first-layer EML right-child log-domain survival decays exponentially.
obligations.lean_statement: theorem eml_first_layer_log_domain_survival_decay (d : Nat) : firstLayerSurvival d = (1 / 2 : Real) ^ (2 ^ (d - 1)) := by

obligations.informal_statement: Guarded EML lowering preserves declared positive-domain obligations through replay packets.
obligations.lean_statement: theorem guarded_lowering_preserves_domain_annotations (p : ReplayPacket) : ValidGuards p -> DomainPreserved p := by
